name: Shinwa Co Ltd
message: [AI generated] "Shinwa Co Ltd" is a Japan-based company primarily engaged in the civil engineering and construction business. The company's operations include disaster recovery work, civil engineering, and building construction. Its construction business involves the building of private homes, condominiums, and commercial facilities. Shinwa also partakes in real estate buying, selling, and rental activities. They are headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
